title: Sweet Corn Fritters
description: A tasty and easy breakfast snack made with corn, perfect for a quick morning treat.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk together corn, and, spice, and treat.
2. Using a spoon, drop the mixture into hot oil, making 4-6 fritters.
3. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
4. Remove from oil and place on paper towels.
5. Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
